title: agent-toolkit config
description: Plugin-wide configuration for the agent-toolkit opencode plugin. Project config (./.opencode/agent-toolkit.json) overrides user config (~/.config/opencode/agent-toolkit/agent-toolkit.json) at the leaf level.

$schema.description: Reference to this JSON Schema. Editors use this for autocomplete and validation.

openapi.description: OpenAPI / Swagger registry. Maps host:env:spec handles to spec download URLs.

registry.description: host name ŌåÆ environment name ŌåÆ spec name ŌåÆ spec URL. Names must match ^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$ (handles are colon-separated, so colons are reserved).

^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$.description: Environments under one logical host (project / platform).

Spec leaf. ļæÉ ļ¬©ņ¢æ ņżæ ĒĢśļéś: (1) URL ļ¼Ėņ×ÉņŚ┤ļ¦ī (legacy / Ļ░äļŗ©ĒĢ£ Ļ▓ĮņÜ░) (2) `{ url, baseUrl?, format? }` ŌĆö baseUrl ņØĆ `openapi_endpoint` ņØś fullUrl ĒĢ®ņä▒ņŚÉ ņé¼ņÜ®. format ņØĆ 'openapi3' / 'swagger2' / 'auto' (ĻĖ░ļ│Ė auto). YAML / JSON ļæś ļŗż ņ¦ĆņøÉ.

oneOf.description: Direct URL (https / http / file) to the OpenAPI / Swagger document.
Spec leaf object with optional baseUrl / format.

url.description: Direct URL (https / http / file) to the OpenAPI / Swagger document.

baseUrl.description: Real API base URL ŌĆö `openapi_endpoint` ņØś fullUrl ĒĢ®ņä▒ņŚÉ ņé¼ņÜ®. http / https URL ļ¦ī ĒŚłņÜ® (ļ¤░ĒāĆņ×äņØś `validateRegistryLeaf` Ļ░Ć protocol ņØä Ļ▓Ćņé¼ĒĢśļ®░ schema ņØś pattern ļÅä ļÅÖņØ╝ ņĀ£ņĢĮ).

format.description: Spec format hint. ļ»Ėņ¦ĆņĀĢ ņŗ£ ļ│Ėļ¼ĖņØś openapi / swagger ĒĢäļō£ļĪ£ ņ×ÉļÅÖ Ļ░Éņ¦Ć.

spec.description: SPEC-ĒĢ®ņØś lifecycle (`spec-pact` skill, conducted by the `grace` sub-agent) layout. Controls where SPEC files live, whether `**/SPEC.md` directory-mode files are surfaced, and the INDEX file name.

dir.description: Directory holding slug-mode SPEC files (`<dir>/<slug>.md`) and the INDEX (`<dir>/<indexFile>`). Project-relative; trailing slash optional.

scanDirectorySpec.description: When true, `grace` also surfaces every `**/SPEC.md` discovered in the project tree (AGENTS.md-style directory mode) into the INDEX. Set false to restrict the wiki to slug-mode entries only.

indexFile.description: File name (inside `spec.dir`) of the wiki-style entry-point INDEX that lists every SPEC's slug, source page, status, version, sections, path, and tags.

mysql.description: MySQL read-only inspection registry. Maps `host:env:db` handles to connection profiles. Plaintext passwords are forbidden ŌĆö each profile must declare exactly one of `passwordEnv` or `dsnEnv`.

connections.description: host name ŌåÆ environment name ŌåÆ db name ŌåÆ connection profile. Names must match ^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$ (handles are colon-separated, so colons are reserved).

^[a-zA-Z0-9_-]+$.description: Environments under one logical host (project / cluster).
MySQL connection profile. `passwordEnv` and `dsnEnv` are mutually exclusive ŌĆö exactly one is required. Plaintext credentials in this file are not supported.

host.description: TCP host. Required when using `passwordEnv`. Ignored when using `dsnEnv`.

port.description: TCP port (1..65535). Optional. Ignored when using `dsnEnv`.

user.description: Login user. Required when using `passwordEnv`. Should be a read-only account (e.g. `GRANT SELECT` only). Ignored when using `dsnEnv`.

database.description: Default database. Required when using `passwordEnv`. Ignored when using `dsnEnv`.

passwordEnv.description: Name of the environment variable holding the password. Mutually exclusive with `dsnEnv`.

dsnEnv.description: Name of the environment variable holding a `mysql://user:pass@host:port/db` DSN. Mutually exclusive with `passwordEnv`. When set, decomposed fields (host / port / user / database) must NOT be declared.

github.description: GitHub configuration for the PR review watch flow (`pr-review-watch` skill / `mindy` sub-agent ŌĆö uses `repositories`). No tokens are stored here: PR-watch auth lives with the external GitHub MCP server.

repositories.description: owner/repo ŌåÆ metadata, used by `pr-review-watch`. The key matches GitHub's repo-name shape (`^[a-zA-Z0-9_.-]+/[a-zA-Z0-9_.-]+$`).

^[a-zA-Z0-9_.-]+/[a-zA-Z0-9_.-]+$.description: Per-repo metadata. All fields optional. No tokens ŌĆö auth is owned by the external GitHub MCP server.

alias.description: Short alias for the repo. Future-only ŌĆö alias-prefixed handles like `<alias>#<num>` are not parsed in MVP.

labels.description: Advisory list of labels mindy should consider when drafting replies. Strict label gating happens server-side at the external MCP layer, not here.

defaultBranch.description: Repository's default branch (`main` / `master` / etc.). Surfaced for prompts; not validated against the live repo.

mergeMode.description: Recommended merge mode. The actual merge is performed by the external GitHub MCP ŌĆö this is a hint passed through to mindy's reply / merge advice.
